name: Orica Limited
analysis: ORI has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. EMAs are compressed, suggesting a big move is building. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Risk/reward is 0.81:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
